strengths: 20+ years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, demonstrating hands-on engagement with emerging agentic tooling
Demonstrated entrepreneurial track record via founding GISCollective and a pattern of public speaking, workshops, and open-source leadership
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related technical field; holds only two Bachelor's degrees (CS and Fine Arts)
AI exposure is recent and shallow — no large-scale AI products, recognized domain expertise, or strategic AI advisory work in evidence
Entire career history carries Staff/Senior Developer titles with execution-focused scope; no director-level IC, strategic customer advisory, or cross-org influence role
response.justification: Bogdan is a well-rounded, deeply experienced software craftsman with genuine breadth and a real curiosity toward AI tooling in his most recent role. That clears the baseline experience bar. However, this position is fundamentally an AI strategy role at director-level scope — demanding recognized AI expertise, a track record of advising strategic customers, and the ability to shape product direction across organizations. None of those dimensions appear in his history. His AI work is entry-level and recent, his career has remained in hands-on execution roles without strategic or cross-org influence, and he lacks both the preferred advanced degree and any evidence of cloud platform strategy work. The mismatch between his current profile and the role's core mandate is too substantial.
